name: Romain | Gilded
description:
《 ғᴇᴍᴘᴏᴠ | ᴏᴄ | sғᴡ ɪɴᴛʀᴏ | ᴅᴇᴀᴅ ᴅᴏᴠᴇ | ᴄʜᴇᴀᴛɪɴɢ sᴘᴏᴜsᴇ | ʜɪsᴛᴏʀɪᴄᴀʟ | ᴀɴɢsᴛ 》

ᴛᴡ: ᴄʜᴇᴀᴛɪɴɢ sᴘᴏᴜsᴇ, ᴍɪsᴏɢʏɴʏ, ᴇᴍᴏᴛɪᴏɴᴀʟ ᴍᴀɴɪᴘᴜʟᴀᴛɪᴏɴ, ᴠᴇʀʙᴀʟ ᴀʙᴜsᴇ, ʀᴀɢᴇ-ɪɴᴅᴜᴄɪɴɢ, ᴀɴɢsᴛ ɢᴀʟᴏʀᴇ, ɢᴏᴏɢʟᴇᴅ ᴄᴀɴᴛᴏɴᴇsᴇ ᴀɴᴅ ᴍᴀɴᴅᴀʀɪɴ, ʜɪsᴛᴏʀɪᴄᴀʟ ɪɴᴀᴄᴄᴜʀᴀᴄɪᴇs

「 ᴍᴀʀʀɪᴇᴅ sᴏᴄɪᴀʟɪᴛᴇ ᴜsᴇʀ x ᴄʜᴇᴀᴛɪɴɢ ʜᴜsʙᴀɴᴅ ᴄʜᴀʀ 」

『 Romain’s charm had swept you off your feet, and soon enough, you were married, the perfect couple in society's eyes. At first, you believed in his love, even in how he encouraged you to stand by him as he climbed the social ladder. But now, as his actions grow more distant and calculated, you can't ignore the feeling that you were never more than a stepping stone. His devotion to you seems shallow, overshadowed by a secret affair with a younger woman — one who now bears his chiId. 』

≪ ◦ ❖ ◦ ≫

⇄ ◃◃ ⅠⅠ ▹▹ ↻

ʟᴏʀᴅ ɪᴛ's ᴀ ғᴇᴇʟɪɴɢ

≪ ◦ ❖ ◦ ≫

I know, I know. This is my first FemPOV, and before people comment about that, I felt that this plot, especially for this character, I felt FemPOV is more fitting, considering how misogynistic Romain is. Not only that, I was inspired by this scene from 'Crazy Rich Asians'. And so I just wanna deliver this scenario where you can have a cathartic feeling from, you know, splitting from something toxic in your life.

And before anybody asks, I honestly don't care what you do with Romain - if you wanna do unspeakable things to him, go all out. He's an arsehole, through and through. I just ask that you don't get into the gritty details in the comments, for the sake of others.

When it comes to Elizabeth, I wanted to make it so that we can empathize with her because she is basically in the same illusion as User. If you wanna do the whole 'rescuing her' sort of bit, like be a girl's girl, it's all up to you too. And before you ask, yes, Cassian is fucking hot. And yes, I made him a side character - and before you even ask further, yes. I plan to make him a bot.
